title: Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa - Ministry of Education
content:
## Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Understand what your child will have learned by Tau 10 at kura, plus guidance on ways you can help them progress their learning at home.
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 9 to 10
- Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
- Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa Pāngarau – Tau 10 Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 10
- Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 10
We’re inviting whānau to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey
- Pāngarau – Tau 10 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mututanga o te Tau 10 ki te kura. Find out more

### Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 10
Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i Te Reo Rangatira i ngā Tau 10 ki te kura.
